title: Immersive Lanterns (Unofficial Patch
description: Unofficial patch of Immersive Lanterns by Toni. Removes hard dependencies on Sodium Dynamic Lights and Accessories, allowing use with LambDynamicLights and/or Curios API.
body:
The original [Immersive Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-lanterns) mod by Toni has not been updated for current loaders and shipped with hard dependencies that break many modpacks notably requiring specific dynamic-light and belt-slot mods even when you use alternatives.

This is an **unofficial NeoForge 1.21.1 build** that removes those requirements and restores proper optional integration. All credit for the mod concept and assets goes to **Toni (Txni)**; this fork only ports and fixes compatibility ([GitHub](https://github.com/kgbcupcake/ImmersiveLanterns-Fix) · [issue #38 on the original repo](https://github.com/txnimc/ImmersiveLanterns/issues/38)).

## What changed

- **NeoForge 1.21.1 only**  no Fabric / old Forge / Stonecutter
- **No txnilib**  native NeoForge config
- **No hard `mods.toml` dependencies**  the game loads without Curios, Accessories, or dynamic-light mods installed
- **Curios and Accessories**  use either or **both** in the same pack (belt detection, rendering, and dynamic lights work for both)
- **Dynamic lights optional**  [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) and/or [Sodium Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights)
- **Iris**  optional shader held-item light mapping when Iris is present

## Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.1**
- **NeoForge**
- At least one belt-slot mod: **[Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)** and/or **[Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)**

## Optional

- LambDynamicLights or Sodium Dynamic Lights  glow while the lantern is worn
- Iris  shader compatibility

## Report bugs

Please use the [ImmersiveLanterns-Fix issue tracker](https://github.com/kgbcupcake/ImmersiveLanterns-Fix/issues) for this version only  not Toni.
